label: Relocation Pak
blurb: Moving, Storage & Junk Removal. Fleet optimization, dispute resolution, and asset recovery.

skills.label: Junk Removal Dump Fee Calculator
skills.method: Estimates landfill tipping fees based on a photo analysis of the junk pile (wood vs. heavy concrete), ensuring the quote covers the disposal cost.
trigger_examples: protects margins on heavy hauling jobs

skills.label: Moving Crew Tip Splitter
skills.method: Divides the customer's cash tip fairly based on whether the crew had 2, 3, or 4 guys, and who acted as the lead driver vs. the lumper.

skills.label: Moving Truck Cubic Feet Estimator
skills.method: Translates a customer's vague web form ("3 bed house, big couch") into an exact cubic-feet estimate, selecting the right box-truck size and crew count.
trigger_examples: prevents moving day disasters where the truck is too small

skills.label: Packing Box Inventory Predictor
skills.method: Calculates exactly how many rolls of tape, wardrobe boxes, and dish-pack inserts a specific house will require, ensuring the crew brings enough supplies.
trigger_examples: stops the crew from running to home depot mid-job

skills.label: Furniture Damage Claim Deflector
skills.method: Prompts the crew to take timestamped photos of pre-existing scratches on expensive TVs/dressers before wrapping them, requiring a customer e-signature.
trigger_examples: saves moving companies thousands in false damage claims

skills.label: Self Storage Auction Legal Notice
skills.method: Auto-generates the state-specific certified mail notices and newspaper classified ads required before a facility can legally auction off a delinquent unit.

skills.label: Stair Carry Heavy Item Surcharge
skills.method: Auto-adds hazard pay and extra crew costs to the invoice when the customer notes a piano or gun safe needs to go up a 3rd-floor walkup.
trigger_examples: protects workers' backs and company margins

skills.label: Dumpster Rental Overage Biller
skills.method: Automatically bills the contractor's credit card on file if the landfill receipt shows the roll-off dumpster exceeded the 2-ton weight limit.
trigger_examples: captures lost revenue from heavy debris

skills.label: Interstate Moving Weight Ticket Logger
skills.method: Logs DOT weigh-station tickets (empty truck vs. full truck) to accurately and legally bill cross-country clients by the pound.

skills.label: Storage Unit Climate Control Monitor
skills.method: Alerts management immediately if the HVAC fails in the premium wine/art storage sector, dispatching emergency repair before inventory is ruined.
